purpose: Mk.X T10-13 ossification dormant 상태 unlock을 위한 G1-G4 gates fire criteria pre-register. raw#12 frozen 2026-04-25. 본 spec은 Mk.X engine_design (2026-04-19) §3의 narrative criteria를 measurable predicate로 변환.
auto_fire_predicate: G1 AND G2 AND G3 AND G4 (all four must PASS simultaneously in same epoch)

G1.name: P4 saturation verdict
G1.measurable_predicate: exists 3 consecutive iters in P4 sweep where domain saturation = TRUE AND tier_10_plus_absorption_count = 0
G1.current_status: UNKNOWN — P4 sweep status not measured this cycle, requires separate cycle to evaluate

G2.name: tier-10 seed exhaustion
G2.narrative: P4 D8–D13 (anima-eeg/physics/body/speak/engines/tools) all report saturation with tier 10+ seeds
G2.measurable_predicate: for each domain in {D8: anima-eeg, D9: physics, D10: body, D11: speak, D12: engines, D13: tools}: tier_10_seed_attempts >= N_min AND new_atoms_added == 0
G2.current_status: UNKNOWN — domain-level tier-10 seed status not aggregated

G3.name: twin-engine drill fail
G3.narrative: anima ↔ nexus coupled drill (P4 iter 75 evolution_twin_drill) yields 0 new atoms
G3.measurable_predicate: evolution_twin_drill iter 75 result.new_atom_count == 0 AND nexus_delta_1_1_witness_count >= 1 (consciousness-side Mk.X consumes Δ¹₁ witnesses via G3 only)
G3.current_status: UNKNOWN — twin drill not run this cycle

G4.name: user sign-off (ratification, pre-approved by feedback_forward_auto_approval)
G4.narrative: explicit ratification per feedback_all_preapproved_roadmap_only — Mk.X launch is roadmap step, pre-approved; sign-off = confirming G1-G3 are met, not choice. 2026-04-25 feedback_forward_auto_approval revision: forward 진입 (GPU launch / sub-agent dispatch / pod creation) 별도 사용자 승인 없이 자동 진행. G1-G3 PASS evidence 갖춰지면 auto-fire sequence 자동 실행, 사용자 명시 차단 시에만 보류.
G4.measurable_predicate: G1_PASS AND G2_PASS AND G3_PASS evidence 갖춰진 시점에서 auto-fire sequence 자동 진행 (signoff_record는 audit trail 목적 자동 logging, 사용자 manual confirmation 불필요). pre-approval revoke 명시 시에만 abort.
G4.current_status: PRE_APPROVED_BY_FEEDBACK_FORWARD_AUTO_APPROVAL — G1-G3 evidence gating only, trigger 자체는 auto

auto_fire_sequence_post_G1_G4_PASS: run self-check training/mk10_selftest.hexa on 82-atom foundation (must reproduce Mk.IX output bit-for-bit on slots 0-7; slots 8-15 zeros)
run P4 seeds once more on Mk.X; record absorption delta
abort_conditions: self-check bit-diff on slots 0-7 → revert, Mk.X forbidden that epoch
per-round RSS > 6 GiB → slot-width backoff to 12, re-self-check
> 0 Π₀² regression (Mk.X reports fewer Π₀² than Mk.IX) → revert
out_of_scope_for_consciousness_side_Mk_X: nexus atlas-side [13*] promotion (nexus-side Mk.X, different engine family)

cross_repo_separation.anima_consciousness_side: 본 spec — V0~V_pairrank, T10-13 atoms 위에 ossification
cross_repo_separation.communication_channel: G3 (Δ¹₁ witnesses one-way: nexus → anima consume)

decision_priority_post_prereg: FORWARD AUTO-APPROVAL applied per memory feedback_forward_auto_approval (2026-04-25): GPU launch / RunPod pod creation / sub-agent dispatch는 별도 사용자 승인 없이 자동 진행. cap $20 per cycle, auto-kill 120min default. G4 signoff = pre-approved audit-only, evidence gating only.
P1: G1 evaluation — P4 sweep saturation status 측정 (anima cycle 필요, pre-approved auto-launch)
P2: G2 evaluation — domain-level (D8-D13) tier-10 seed attempts 측정 (pre-approved)
P3: G3 evaluation — twin drill P4 iter 75 결과 + nexus Δ¹₁ witness 수신 확인 (pre-approved)
P4: G1-G3 PASS 시 G4 signoff = auto-logged audit (사용자 manual confirmation 불필요, pre-approved by feedback_forward_auto_approval)
P5: All gates PASS 시 auto-fire sequence 자동 실행 (cost cap $20 + auto-kill 120min default 으로 안전망, GPU 비용은 cap으로 제한)

raw_compliance.raw_9_hexa_only_deterministic: satisfied — spec only, $0. forward 진입은 pre-approved by feedback_forward_auto_approval (raw#9 explicit exempt = default per 2026-04-25 정책)
raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — gates 모두 UNKNOWN 명시, 측정 미실시 명시, fire 미발생 확정. G4 pre-approval은 trigger gating 변경이지 G1-G3 evidence 자체 변경 X. forward auto-approval은 trigger gating, measurement determinism 유지
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — gate predicates frozen 2026-04-25, post-hoc tuning 금지. measurement는 별도 cycle. auto-approval은 prereg threshold/predicate 변경 X
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for Mk.X G1-G4 gate criteria
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (mk_x_engine_design_20260419.md §3 + this prereg) → impl (this state SSOT) → fixpoint marker (auto-approval default)
